title: Speak Dine
description: An AI-assisted voice-accessibility food delivery app built for visually impaired users. Integrates STT, TTS, and conversational AI via Gemini API. Built with Flutter and Firebase for cross-platform delivery.

title: Glaucoma Detection
description: Trained a deep learning model on the EyePACS + AIROGS Light v2 dataset for retinal fundus image classification and early glaucoma detection.

title: Smart Trash Routing
description: Optimized waste-collection vehicle routing using graph theory algorithms, significantly reducing fuel consumption and operational time.

title: OGDC E-Medical Dashboard
description: Internal medical management dashboard built during internship at OGDC. Oracle SQL-backed data visualization with AI-driven analytics for patient records.

title: Nextcent Web App
description: A community-focused web platform for managing memberships, events, and resources with a clean, modern interface.
